query:
SELECT DISTINCT li.productName, li.productType
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items li
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads wu ON wu.id = li.uploadId
WHERE wu.supplier = 'SasBoss'
  AND li.productName != '(blank)'
  AND li.productName != ''
ORDER BY li.productName
LIMIT 40;
